factions.name: Legiones Astartes (Baseline)
factions.subtitle: Generic Loyalist/Traitor Legion Template
factions.lore: Generic Legiones Astartes baseline rules. This template provides every Legion's shared formations, units, transports and rolling stock. Each specific Legion override applies its own identity, trait and any unique formations layered on top.

legionTrait.name: Legiones Astartes
legionTrait.description: Baseline template — see your specific Legion's trait card.

compositionRules: Max 3 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army.
Max 4 Upgrades per formation.
Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies.

formations.name: Assault Detachment
formations.composition: 8 Assault units (+25 each additional, up to 10)

formations.name: Breacher Detachment
formations.composition: 8 Breacher units (+25 each additional, up to 10)

formations.name: Terminator Detachment
formations.composition: 4 Terminator units (+75 each additional, up to 6)

formations.name: Outrider Squad
formations.composition: 4 Outriders OR Attack Bikes (+25 each, up to 6)

formations.name: Javelin Attack Speeder Squadron
formations.composition: 4 Javelin Attack Speeders (+50 each, up to 6)

formations.name: Land Raider Squadron
formations.composition: 4 Land Raiders Phobos OR Proteus (+75/+65 each, up to 6)

formations.name: Superheavy Squadron
formations.composition: 1 Fellblade OR Glaive (+250 each, up to 3)

upgrades.name: Standard Transport
upgrades.description: Add enough Rhino carriers to transport the entire formation after all other upgrades are added. You may upgrade 1 Rhino to a Damocles.

upgrades.name: Drop Assault
upgrades.description: The formation may deploy via Drop Pods. Use Spacecraft pool for Drop Pods.

upgrades.name: Heavy Transport
upgrades.description: Add enough Land Raiders OR Spartans OR Termites OR Mastodons to transport the entire formation after all other upgrades are added.

upgrades.name: Assault Claw
upgrades.description: Add enough Kharybdys OR Cestus Assault Rams to transport the entire formation after all other upgrades are added.

upgrades.name: Teleport
upgrades.description: Add the Teleport trait to each INF unit in the formation.

upgrades.name: Consul
upgrades.description: Add 1 Champion, Librarian or Chaplain. One Champion per force may be upgraded to a Commander.

upgrades.name: Dreadnought
upgrades.description: Add 1-2 Castraferrum, Contemptor, Leviathan or Deredeo dreadnoughts in any combination.

upgrades.name: Support Squads
upgrades.description: Add 1-4 Tactical Support or Heavy Support units.

upgrades.name: Hyperios
upgrades.description: Add 1-2 Whirlwind Hyperios.

upgrades.name: Tank
upgrades.description: Add 1-2 tanks: Predators, Sicarans, Vindicators, Cerberus, Typhons or Kratos.

upgrades.name: Rapier
upgrades.description: Add 1-4 Rapiers of any configuration.

upgrades.name: Armoury Asset
upgrades.description: Upgrade 1-2 vehicles in this formation to special variants (Infernus, Executioner, Scorpius, Omega, Venator, Achilles, Deredeo, Vindicator Destroyer).

champion.name: Champion
notes: May be upgraded to Commander (1 per force).

factions.name: Solar Auxilia
factions.subtitle: Excertus Imperialis · Cohorts of the Hundred Worlds
factions.lore: The elite of the mortal Excertus Imperialis. Drawn from Terra's solar domains and moulded by the Principia Belicosa, the Solar Auxilia Cohorts march in serried ranks behind armoured spearheads of Leman Russ, Malcadors and ancient war engines. Less numerous than the Imperial Army but disciplined, professional and exquisitely equipped — the backstop of the Legiones Astartes.

legionTrait.name: Cohorts of the Solar Auxilia
legionTrait.description: Strategy Rating 3 · Initiative 2+. May field 2 Support per Line, with up to 3 Upgrades per formation. One free Legate Commander per full 750 points (does not cost points).

compositionRules: Max 2 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army.
Max 3 Upgrades per formation.
Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies.
Strategy Rating 3, Initiative 2+.
Includes 1 free Legate Commander per full 750 points; first attaches to the Lord Marshall's formation (or most expensive Line if none).
Armoured Spearhead: may garrison one formation with 3+ AV units per full 2,000 pts.
Orbital Support: 1 per force.
Command Retinue: 1 per force.

formations.composition: 4 Leman Russ Battle Tank or Exterminator (+50 each, up to 6)

factions.name: Imperialis Militia
factions.subtitle: Imperial Army · The Teeming Masses
factions.lore: The numerical backbone of the Imperium. Where the Astartes break the enemy line the Imperial Army holds it — billions of soldiers drawn from a thousand worlds, led by hetmen and watched over by discipline masters. They lack the lustre of the Legions but in their hordes of machines, infantry and provincial provenances they prove that Mankind's greatest weapon is sheer mortal will.

legionTrait.name: Provenances of the Imperial Army
legionTrait.description: Strategy Rating 2 · Initiative 2+. May field 2 Support per Line, with up to 3 Upgrades per formation. Select up to two Provenances; each formation chooses one to modify INF stats (Determined, Feral Warriors, Survivors, Traitors, Void Fighters, Warrior Elite).

compositionRules: Max 2 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army.
Max 3 Upgrades per formation.
Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies.
Strategy Rating 2, Initiative 2+.
Includes 1 free Discipline Master per full 750 points (Rogue Psyker if Traitors provenance taken).
Choose up to 2 Provenances for the army; each formation picks one.
Field Gun Battery: 1 per 1,000 pts.  Hydra Flak Battery / Destroyer Tank Hunter: 1 per 2,000 pts.
Militia Command Detachment: 1 per force.  Orbital Support: 1 per force.

factions.name: Knight Households
factions.subtitle: Noble Lances · Houses of Adamantium
factions.lore: Hereditary noble lineages whose pilots bond with towering Knight engines forged in the Martian temples. Lesser than Titans but far more responsive, the Knights of House Devine, House Vyronii and a hundred others ride to war in resplendent heraldry — and the fires of the Heresy will see those ancient names raised in glory or ground to dust.

legionTrait.name: Noble Lances
legionTrait.description: Strategy Rating 3 · Initiative 2+. Formations gain +1 to Engage Action tests and +1 to Rally tests. 2 Support per Line, max 3 Upgrades per formation. Optional Household Trait: Second Greatest Predator — +1 to hit in assault vs AV character units; force enemy critical-hit rerolls.

compositionRules: Max 2 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army.
Max 3 Upgrades per formation.
Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies.
Strategy Rating 3, Initiative 2+; +1 to Engage actions and Rally tests.
Special Rules: Ion Gauntlet and Ion Shield (4+ saves vs shooting/Firefight, vs CC for Gauntlet).
Cerastus Lance and Grand Quesetorius Lance: 1 per 2,000 pts each.
Optional Household Trait: Second Greatest Predator.

formations.name: Cerastus Lance
formations.composition: 3 Lancers OR Castigators (+125 each, up to 5; 1 per 2,000 pts)

formations.name: Grand Quesetorius Lance
formations.composition: 3 Quesetorius Grand Knights (+125 each, up to 4; 1 per 2,000 pts)

upgrades.name: Aspirants
upgrades.description: Formation suffers -1 to Advance, Overwatch, March, Marshall, and Sustained Fire action rolls (reduces cost).

upgrades.name: Enhanced Forges
upgrades.description: Upgrade any Knight in the formation to an Acheron or Atropos (Cerastus variant).

upgrades.name: Exalted Armoury
upgrades.description: Upgrade 1-2 Knights to a Quesetorius Grand Knight or Mechanicum House Knight.

upgrades.name: Martian Support
upgrades.description: Add 1-2 Mechanicum House Knights and/or 1-3 Armiger Moirax.

upgrades.description: Add 1 Lord Scion OR Preceptor character.

weapons.firepower: 2× AP3+/AT6+, Ignore cover / (small arms) EA (+1), Ignore cover

castellan.name: Dominus Castellan
notes: Shieldbreaker missiles ignore Invulnerable saves and Void shields.

factions.name: Legio Titanicus
factions.subtitle: Colleagia Titanica · The God-Machines
factions.lore: The towering colossi of Mars — Warhounds, Reavers, Warlords and their immortal cousins. Pilots called Princeps meld their minds with the machine spirits of their Titans, walking fortresses whose tread shakes continents. The Heresy will see Legio set against Legio and the gods of battle pitted against one another.

legionTrait.name: Engines of the Omnissiah
legionTrait.description: Strategy Rating 3 · Initiative 1+. 2 Support per Line; max 3 Upgrades per formation. Special rules: Void Shields. Optional Legio Trait: Heart of Steel (reroll critical-hit damage results) OR Warhorn (15cm AOE Blast markers on a 5+).

compositionRules: Max 2 Support detachments per Line detachment in the army.
Max 3 Upgrades per formation.
Max 1/3 of total points value may be spent on Lords of War or Allies.
Strategy Rating 3, Initiative 1+.
Special Rules: Void Shields (each shield stops 1 hit, repairs 1 per end phase).
Warhound Scout, Direwolf and Warbringer Support: 1 per 2,000 pts each.
Emperor Titan Lord of War: 1 per 7,500 pts.
Psi-Titan: Loyalist forces only.
Optional Legio Traits: Heart of Steel OR Warhorn.
